x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case relationships (parent cases, related incidents, linked tasks) provide context Now Assist uses for comprehensive case summarization. Isolated cases without relationships limit AI summary depth.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Encourage HR agents to link related cases, incidents, and tasks using the Related Records tab. Configure automation to auto-link related HR cases by employee. Now Assist HRSD summarization improves with relationship context.
